English: Your Primary does [VAR0_PERCENT] more damage.#While you are at full HP, your Primary shoots a sword beam that deals [STR] damage to enemies.
Japanese: Your Primary does [VAR0_PERCENT] more damage.#While you are at full HP, your Primary shoots a sword beam that deals [STR] damage to enemies.
Chinese: Your Primary does [VAR0_PERCENT] more damage.#While you are at full HP, your Primary shoots a sword beam that deals [STR] damage to enemies.

English: Your max HP is increased by 1.#Every [CD], a Phoenix Ember will spawn in a random spot. Starts on cooldown.#Gather embers by touching them.#Stand still to use all embers to revive a random nearby rabbit with 1 HP per ember consumed.
Japanese: Your max HP is increased by 1.#Every [CD], a Phoenix Ember will spawn in a random spot. Starts on cooldown.#Gather embers by touching them.#Stand still to use all embers to revive a random nearby rabbit with 1 HP per ember consumed.
Chinese: Your max HP is increased by 1.#Every [CD], a Phoenix Ember will spawn in a random spot. Starts on cooldown.#Gather embers by touching them.#Stand still to use all embers to revive a random nearby rabbit with 1 HP per ember consumed.

English: Your max HP is reduced by 1.#When you use your Defensive, gain [GRANITESKIN].#Starts battle on cooldown.#This item's cooldown is set to [CD] when you are shielded or take damage.
Japanese: Your max HP is reduced by 1.#When you use your Defensive, gain [GRANITESKIN].#Starts battle on cooldown.#This item's cooldown is set to [CD] when you are shielded or take damage.
Chinese: Your max HP is reduced by 1.#When you use your Defensive, gain [GRANITESKIN].#Starts battle on cooldown.#This item's cooldown is set to [CD] when you are shielded or take damage.

English: Every [CD], [OMEGACHARGE] your Primary (max: 1).#Cannot be reset by ability or loot effects.#This item's cooldown is set to [CD] when you use your Primary.
Japanese: Every [CD], [OMEGACHARGE] your Primary (max: 1).#Cannot be reset by ability or loot effects.#This item's cooldown is set to [CD] when you use your Primary.

English: The Treasure Digger glows when you are near a hidden [SUPER] cache. Stand still to unearth the cache.
Japanese: The Treasure Digger glows when you are near a hidden [SUPER] cache. Stand still to unearth the cache.
Chinese: The Treasure Digger glows when you are near a hidden [SUPER] cache. Stand still to unearth the cache.

English: Every [CD] [ULTRACHARGE] the next ability in this list (loops): Primary, Secondary, Special.
Japanese: Every [CD] [ULTRACHARGE] the next ability in this list (loops): Primary, Secondary, Special.
Chinese: Every [CD] [ULTRACHARGE] the next ability in this list (loops): Primary, Secondary, Special.

English: Moving down builds Falling Stacks. When no longer moving down, consume all Falling Stacks and deal [STR] damage to nearby enemies for each stack consumed.
Japanese: Moving down builds Falling Stacks. When no longer moving down, consume all Falling Stacks and deal [STR] damage to nearby enemies for each stack consumed.
Chinese: Moving down builds Falling Stacks. When no longer moving down, consume all Falling Stacks and deal [STR] damage to nearby enemies for each stack consumed.
